type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
For 2018, we used an emission factor of 0.58kg/t (average of data from Dec 2017, 2016 and 2015)

For 2019 we used emission factor of 0.08kg/t (average of data from 2019 and Dec 2017)

Due to all the continuous improvement changes implemented on boiler #10 of our site over the years, the data from 2016 and 2015 were no longer representative of our NH3 emissions.

Another source of the variance can be due to our production numbers being lower in 2019 compared to year's prior.
